testsuite.name: com.logistica.unit.PagoServiceTest
testsuite.system-out: 2026-04-26T16:31:16.409-05:00 WARN 19860 --- [logistica-financiero] [ Test worker] c.l.a.usecases.pago.PagoService : Transición de estado inválida: PAGADO -> EN_PROCESO 2026-04-26T16:31:16.435-05:00 INFO 19860 --- [logistica-financiero] [ Test worker] c.l.a.usecases.pago.PagoService : Evento con mismo estado actual, idempotente: idPago=1499a17f-1725-43a0-938f-b65aa334875c, estado=EN_PROCESO 2026-04-26T16:31:16.456-05:00 INFO 19860 --- [logistica-financiero] [ Test worker] c.l.a.usecases.pago.PagoService : Evento duplicado ignorado: txn-001 2026-04-26T16:31:16.464-05:00 INFO 19860 --- [logistica-financiero] [ Test worker] c.l.a.usecases.pago.PagoService : Evento con mismo estado actual, idempotente: idPago=4e1733da-c56a-4fac-960a-2d94aa9eb9dc, estado=EN_PROCESO 2026-04-26T16:31:16.475-05:00 WARN 19860 --- [logistica-financiero] [ Test worker] c.l.a.usecases.pago.PagoService : Liquidación no encontrada: a6b41ab0-adbb-4cf7-a8e5-68d4f6801d0c
